div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center; width: 260px;

span.p:
Plan emit (explicit POST)
skeleton from az.yaml letter_structure:
intro_and_representation, liability,
injuries_and_treatment,
damages_and_specials, demand_and_deadline

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Deterministic token allocator
each section gets its permitted
FACT/AMT/CITE/EX tokens

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
plan_review — G2.5
attorney edits emphasis + structure,
approves; approval binds plan version
to the FROZEN registry version

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Section drafter — Opus, tokens only
layered prompt: rules_blocks ->
matter_directives ->
final_hard_constraints LAST
DrafterPromptSnapshot (input_hash)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Deterministic validator
tokens ⊆ allocation, structure, lengths
strict single retry -> surfaced_failed
(never silently accepted)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Renderer
resolves tokens via the registry,
emits char-offset spans
(span_id, start, end, token_id)
